---
title: "\'In memoriam Anne Mozley\' By the Editor"
---

## \'In memoriam Anne Mozley\' By the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1891
**Genre:** Non-fiction, obituary
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (September 1891) 341

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
